title: Why Are Global Events Driving the Bank of Canada Rate Hold?

h2_sections.text: How are global events actually affecting mortgage rates right now?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - How are global events actually affecting mortgage rates right now.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A split image showing Middle East oil rigs and a Toronto skyline with a mortgage rate chart overlaid, conveying how international events ripple into Canadian borrowing costs.

h2_sections.text: Did the Bank of Canada just signal lower rates are coming?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Did the Bank of Canada just signal lower rates are coming.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Bank of Canada press conference podium with a blurred spokesperson, a 'rates on hold' graphic on a screen behind them, cautious expressions in the foreground audience.

h2_sections.text: Could rates still go higher later this year?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Could rates still go higher later this year.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Canadian homeowner staring at a rising interest-rate graph on a laptop screen, a worried expression, kitchen table setting with mortgage documents spread out.

h2_sections.text: What happens to your mortgage right now?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - What happens to your mortgage right now.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Canadian couple reviewing their mortgage statement at a kitchen table, one partner pointing at a line item with a concerned look, calculator and paperwork visible.

h2_sections.text: Why are fixed rates still going up?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Why are fixed rates still going up.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A close-up of a Canadian bond yield chart on a trading screen trending upward, a newspaper headline reading 'Fixed Rates Rise Again' partially visible beside it.

h2_sections.text: Should you renew now or wait?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Should you renew now or wait.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Canadian homeowner at a desk holding two printed mortgage renewal quotes and comparing them, a calendar on the wall showing renewal month circled in red.

h2_sections.text: What does this mean for spring home buyers?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - What does this mean for spring home buyers.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Canadian real estate agent pointing at a 'For Sale' sign in front of a suburban home in spring bloom, a buyer couple attentively listening, clipboard in hand.

h2_sections.text: Are prices actually dropping in Toronto and Vancouver?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Are prices actually dropping in Toronto and Vancouver.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Toronto condo tower with a price-reduction banner on a real estate listing board in the foreground, a slightly empty open-house sign visible, overcast sky.

h2_sections.text: What should you expect from the spring market overall?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - What should you expect from the spring market overall.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A busy but calm Canadian open house — a handful of buyers walking through a well-lit suburban home, a realtor greeting them at the door, spring sunlight through large windows.

h2_sections.text: What should Canadians actually do right now?
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - What should Canadians actually do right now.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A Canadian family sitting around a kitchen table with a mortgage professional, reviewing a printed financial plan together, serious but hopeful expressions.

h2_sections.text: Bottom line: Bank of Canada rate hold and what it really means
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - Bottom line_ Bank of Canada rate hold and what it really means.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A confident Canadian mortgage broker shaking hands with a relieved homeowner couple across a desk covered in paperwork, bright office lighting, optimistic atmosphere.

h2_sections.text: List of all FAQs: Bank of Canada Rate Hold and Mortgage Impact
h2_sections.filename: AskRoss.ca - List of all FAQs_ Bank of Canada Rate Hold and Mortgage Impact.png
h2_sections.prompt_hint: A clean split-screen infographic showing common mortgage questions on one side and concise answers on the other, Canadian flag subtly visible in the background.
